rulings.Case Title: HONG YANG AI VS. KEN KWAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Motio To Be Relieved As Counsel
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, DECEMBER 31, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL CINDY LEE'S (FENG & LEE) MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANTS CHRIS WAI AND REBECCA KWAN: HEARING REQUIRED. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN DOE VS. THE GREEK ORTHODOX METROPOLIS OF SAN FRANCISCO, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To Amend Complaint To Allege Punitive Damages
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, DECEMBER 31, 2007, LINE 2. PLAINTIFF JOHN DOE'S MOTION For Leave To Amend Complaint To Allege Punitive Damages IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS PRESENTED EVIDENCE THAT ESTABLISHES A PRIMA FACI BASIS FOR THE AWARD OF PUNITIVE DAMAGES. DEFENDANTS' OPPOSITION FOCUSES ON WHETHER CERTAIN INDIVIDUALS WERE MANAGING AGENTS. THE DECISION IN WHITE V ULTRAMAR (1999) 21 CAL. 4TH 563 MAKES CLEAR THAT THIS IS A QUESTION OF FACT. ALTHOUGH DEFENDANTS CONTEST THE MEANING AND SIGNIFICANCE OF PLAINTIFF'S FACTS, THOSE FACTS CONSTITUTE A PRIMA FACIE SHOWING THAT DEFENDANTS' MANAGING AGENTS HAD KNOWLEDGE OF CRITICAL FACTS AND DID NOT ACT UPON. GOOD CAUSE HAS BEEN SHOWN TO FILE UNDER SEAL THE RECORDS CONDITIONALLY LODGED UNDER SEAL. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID CLARK COLE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, DECEMBER 31, 2007, LINE 6. DEFENDANT CRANE CO.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF PRESENTED TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT BASED ON, AMONG OTHER THINGS, THE DECLARATIONS OF PLAINTIFF, AY AND DEPOSITION OF MCLEAN. GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON THE ISSUE OF PUNITIVE DAMAGES. DENY AS TO OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. DEFENDANT'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: DANIEL DEN HARTOG VS. JACK HILL et al

rulings.Case Title: SUSIE VEDANTHAM VS. JAMES WASHBURN et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, DECEMBER 31, 2007, LINE 5. DEFENDANTS SARAH FRYE, ANNA MORRISSEY, TATIANA KARTOMTEN AND JAMES WASHBURN JR.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION BASED ON THREE DAY NOTICE TO PAY OR QUIT BECAUSE PLAINTIFF PROVIDED THE REQUIRED INFORMATION. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND CAUSE OF ACTION BASED ON NOTICE TO CURE OR QUIT FOR HABITUAL LATE PAYMENTS, CAUSE OF ACTION BASED ON NOTICE TO CURE OR QUIT FOR TRASH VIOLATIONS AND CAUSE OF ACTION BASED ON NOTICE TO CURE OR QUIT FOR STORAGE VIOLATIONS. THE NOTICES ARE DEFECTIVE BECAUSE THE TEXT OF THE NOTICES FAILS TO SET FORTH THE OPPORTUNITY TO CURE. AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION BASED ON THIRTY DAY NOTICE TO QUIT FOR LATE PAYMENTS, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO WASHBURN WHO IS ENTITLED TO SIXTY DAYS (C.C.P. SECTION 1946.1). OVERRULED AS TO OTHER DEFENDANTS. =(302/PJM/PB)
